meaning: n.投,掷,猛冲,暴躁的行动,急冲,嘲弄,讥笑vt.猛投,抛,掷,使陷入,挥动,嘲笑,扫视vi.猛冲,直冲,急行
examples: She claims she had a brief fling with him 30 years ago.
He was determined to have one last fling before retiring.
Boswell's heirs destroyed a passage in his diary where he describes a fling he had with Rosseau's mistress.
When the fling ends, she is still your boss and she may resent the outcome.
